title: VENTION Shallow Stainless Steel Cat Bowl Whisker Friendly, Outer Dia. 14.6 cm Small Cat Dish, Set of 2 Replacement Kitten Bowls 320 ml for Raised Feeding Stand
features: Whisker Fatigue Cat Bowl: Friendly for cat not easily to touch whiskers. Avoid chin acne in cats and dogs
Replacement Cat Bowls: Work well for raised stand and automatic feeder(Measure stand hole diameter and height from hole, and refer to size guide before purchasing)
Healthy Material: Made of 18/8 food grade stainless steel. Durable and sturdy small metal cat bowl. Not easy to rust. Easy to clean and dishwasher safe(Clean with warm soapy water before first use)
Cat Food and Water Bowls: 14.6cm stainless steel cat food dish work for dry or wet food(canned). 145 g solid capacity or 320ml liquid capacity(1.4 cup)
Shallow and Wide Pet Bowls: Kitten, kitty, indoor and outdoor cats, short snout dog
description: Product Description Buyers Show 5 7/10 Inch-Outer Dia. 5 7/10 Inch-Outer Dia.
